title: AI Portfolio Assistant
description: A production-style portfolio website powered by Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) that can answer natural language questions about my projects, skills, achievements, positions of responsibility, and competitive programming profiles.
highlights: Built an end-to-end RAG pipeline using semantic chunking, embeddings, vector search, and grounded response generation.
Integrated ChromaDB Cloud for vector storage and semantic retrieval.
Implemented source-aware responses to reduce hallucinations and improve answer reliability.
Designed a modern portfolio experience combining traditional sections with an AI assistant and coding profile dashboard.

title: Deep Learning-Based Pneumonia Detection System
description: A medical image classification system that detects pneumonia from chest X-ray images using transfer learning and deep neural networks.
highlights: Achieved 91.82% classification accuracy using DenseNet121 transfer learning.
Implemented Grad-CAM visualizations to improve model interpretability.
Developed a Streamlit web application for real-time image prediction.
Deployed the solution on Hugging Face Spaces for public access.

title: Placement Portal
description: A placement management platform designed to streamline internship and placement activities for students, recruiters, and administrators.
highlights: Implemented role-based workflows for students and administrators.
Built secure authentication and authorization using JWT.
Developed CRUD operations for job postings, applications, and user profiles.
Designed RESTful APIs and integrated them with a responsive frontend.

title: Real-Time Multiplayer Tic Tac Toe
description: A multiplayer game platform that enables users to create private rooms and play Tic Tac Toe in real time through WebSocket communication.
highlights: Implemented real-time gameplay using Socket.IO.
Built secure authentication using JWT and cookies.
Designed room creation, room joining, and turn-management systems.
Handled game state synchronization, winner detection, and draw conditions on the server.

title: SMS Spam Classifier
description: An NLP-based text classification system that predicts whether an SMS message is spam or legitimate.
highlights: Performed text preprocessing and feature extraction using TF-IDF vectorization.
Trained and evaluated machine learning models for spam detection.
Built an efficient preprocessing pipeline for handling raw SMS data.
Integrated the model into a Streamlit application for real-time predictions.

title: Multi-Persona AI Chatbot
description: A conversational AI system capable of mimicking the speaking styles of different public personalities through fine-tuned language models.
highlights: Fine-tuned GPT-2 Medium on curated personality-specific datasets.
Collected and processed conversational transcripts to create custom training data.
Implemented causal language modeling using Hugging Face Transformers.
Built an interactive interface for persona-based conversations.
